raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-K-003] interface.f90:7 <-> header.h:2
  PARAM_ORDER: param[4]: Fortran='src_ld'(INTEGER(c_int)), C='dst_ld'(int)
  PARAM_ORDER: param[5]: Fortran='dst_ld'(INTEGER(c_int)), C='src_ld'(int)
  Types are compatible but parameters are swapped at positions 4 and 5.
  All matrix rows will be copied with wrong strides. Silent wrong results.

NOTE: Validator matched by position, not by name. Names are informational only.
